issue.title: Hardcoded backslash in `.tiki` path construction breaks macOS/Linux

successCriteria.description: All 7 hardcoded `\.tiki` path constructions are replaced with cross-platform separators
Project switching works on macOS and Linux as well as Windows
Build passes (pnpm build) with no type errors after the change

phases.title: Replace hardcoded backslash separators with forward-slash in path construction
phases.content:
Update all 7 `${activeProject(.|?).path}\.tiki` constructions to use `/.tiki`. Forward-slash works on all platforms because Windows `PathBuf::from` and `std::fs` both accept either separator, while POSIX requires forward-slash. This matches the already-correct pattern in [IssueDetail.tsx:126](apps/desktop/src/components/detail/IssueDetail.tsx#L126) and [WorkProgressCard.tsx:77](apps/desktop/src/components/sidebar/WorkProgressCard.tsx#L77).

Sites to update:
- [App.tsx:214](apps/desktop/src/App.tsx#L214)
- [App.tsx:246](apps/desktop/src/App.tsx#L246)
- [App.tsx:268](apps/desktop/src/App.tsx#L268)
- [TikiReleaseDetail.tsx:72](apps/desktop/src/components/detail/TikiReleaseDetail.tsx#L72)
- [ReleasesSection.tsx:190](apps/desktop/src/components/sidebar/ReleasesSection.tsx#L190)
- [ReleasesSection.tsx:201](apps/desktop/src/components/sidebar/ReleasesSection.tsx#L201)
- [ReleasesSection.tsx:318](apps/desktop/src/components/sidebar/ReleasesSection.tsx#L318)

Approach: per-file `replace_all` of the literal substring `\.tiki` with `/.tiki`. The substring is unique to path-construction code in each file.
verification: grep for `\\.tiki` returns no matches in apps/desktop/src
grep for `/.tiki` shows 9 occurrences (7 fixed + 2 already-correct)
